arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals extent of Diogo Jota injury ahead of Liverpool's Champions League clash with Lille
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot provides an update on Diogo Jota's injury ahead of Tuesday's Champions Legaue clash with Lille.

arts.ttl: Emmanuel Petit reveals why he still believes Arsenal can overhaul Liverpool in the title race as he locks horns with Jamie Carragher
arts.sum: The Reds' 2-0 victory at Brentford on Saturday, secured after Darwin Nunez's stoppage-time double, saw them extend their gap over Mikel Arteta's side.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah out to equal Samuel Eto'o record as Liverpool chase Champions League history in Lille clash
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah is aiming to equal a Champions League record set by Samuel Eto'o in Tuesday's home showdown with Lille.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher 'nearly burst out laughing' hearing what Man United player said about Liverpool draw
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as Jamie Carragher references recent comments by Manchester United defender Lisandro Martinez

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher delivers new Darwin Nunez transfer theory after Brentford heroics
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez scored the winning goals for Liverpool at Brentford on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool star risks backlash after Eden Hazard & Mohamed Salah comparison
arts.sum: Curtis Jones has risked angering Liverpool fans by suggesting that former Chelsea star Eden Hazard is a better footballer than current teammate Mohamed Salah.

arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Lille injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between Liverpool and Lille.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Ibrahima Konate makes major contract admission as defender provides update on Anfield future
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate provides an update on his Anfield future after entering the final 18 months of his deal.

arts.ttl: Liverpool left facing transfer dilemma as target turns back on Anfield move
arts.sum: Liverpool are among the top clubs who admire Murillo, but the Nottingham Forest defender will not be on the move anytime soon after penning a new four-year contract

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konaté reveals he is latest Liverpool star still to sign new contract
arts.sum: Centre-half was offered extension three months ago Salah, Van Dijk and Alexander-Arnold deals also in doubt Ibrahima Konaté is the latest Liverpool player to deliberate over his future after confirming the club’s offer of a new contract remains unsigned. The France international has 18 months on his deal and was offered an extension more than three months ago. Liverpool are in a precarious position with Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold, all of whom are in the final six months of their contracts and free to sign a pre-contract agreement with a foreign club.
